text: Compiled queries in EF Core 11 are a scalpel, not a sledgehammer. Store the EF.CompileAsyncQuery delegate in a static readonly field, hand it a fresh DbContext from a pooled factory, pair with AsNoTracking. Win is 20-40% on hot read paths. The trap: compile inside the method and you re-translate every call, which is strictly worse than not compiling at all.
